summary: Timeline Adjustment feature tested successfully. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI components verified - Adjust Timeline button, modal with all form elements, and Timeline History modal all working correctly on both Lead and Project detail pages.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/local-login - Login returns session cookie
Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/adjust-timeline - Resume from hold works
Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/adjust-timeline - New completion date works
Frontend: Adjust Timeline button visible on LeadDetails (data-testid='adjust-timeline-btn')
Frontend: Adjust Timeline button visible on ProjectDetails
Frontend: TimelineAdjustmentModal opens with all components
Frontend: Modal has reason dropdown with 7 options
Frontend: Modal has effective date picker
Frontend: Modal has 3 adjustment type radio buttons
Frontend: Modal has shift days input (conditional)
Frontend: Form validation shows errors for missing fields
critical_code_review_comments: TimelineAdjustmentModal.jsx: Well-structured component with proper form validation and state management
Backend server.py: Timeline adjustment endpoints (lines 4964-5210 for projects, 7288-7511 for leads) properly implement all adjustment types with validation
Permission check: timeline.adjust permission correctly gates the feature
Audit trail: timeline_adjustments array properly stores all adjustment history with user info, dates, and affected stages/milestones
NOTE: Admin user's stored permissions did not include timeline.adjust - had to manually add it. The setup-local-admin endpoint should sync permissions with role defaults.
seed_data_creation: Added timeline.adjust permission to admin user via MongoDB. Created test lead TEST_Timeline_Lead for API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline Adjustment feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/leads/{id}/adjust-timeline and /api/projects/{id}/adjust-timeline work correctly. Frontend components TimelineAdjustmentModal and TimelineHistoryModal are properly integrated. The timeline.adjust permission is required to see the Adjust Timeline button - ensure test users have this permission. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_timeline_adjustment.py can be reused for regression testing.
